name: Junkyard Salvager
description: You are a lone salvager. Trained to repair and restore the wrecked vessels of the galactic junkyard, you scavenge for parts and resources, to build something out of nothing. Unfortunately, you have more enemies than friends. Captured and robbed of what little you have, you are left stranded on an arid planet. No oxygen. No resources. Just you, your A.I., and a suit constructor.
author: Teakeycee
